title: Entertainment Hub with Proxy, Games, and Shows

requirements.summary: Apply dark-themed visual identity with neon accents globally
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same dark background and neon accent colors
Typography is consistent across headings, labels, and body text
No unstyled or default-browser-styled elements are visible

file_operations.description: Define global CSS variables for dark theme with neon accent colors (electric cyan), set body background to near-black, apply consistent modern sans-serif typography, and establish base styles for all elements
Extend Tailwind theme with custom dark background colors, neon accent colors (cyan primary, electric green secondary), and configure typography plugin for consistent font scale across the application

requirements.summary: Create top navigation bar with logo and section links
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is visible on all pages
Clicking each nav link scrolls to or navigates to the correct section
Active section link has a distinct visual indicator

file_operations.description: Create Navigation component with site logo/name 'NexHub', three navigation links (Proxy, Games, Shows) with smooth scroll behavior, active link highlighting using intersection observer or scroll position tracking, and dark theme styling with neon accents
Import and render Navigation component at the top of the app layout, above all section content

acceptanceCriteria: Users can type a URL and click Go to load a site in the iframe
The iframe is displayed below the input in a clearly bounded container
Input field has placeholder text like 'Enter a URL...'
HTTPS URLs are accepted and passed to the iframe src

file_operations.description: Create ProxySection component with a URL input field (placeholder 'Enter a URL...'), Go button, and full-width iframe container. Implement state management for URL input and iframe src, validate HTTPS URLs, and style with dark theme card layout
Import and render ProxySection component with an id='proxy' attribute for navigation anchor targeting

requirements.summary: Build Games section with playable browser games grid
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 game cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has a title, thumbnail, and Play button
Clicking Play loads the game in an iframe or inline view
Games are accessible without login

file_operations.description: Create GamesSection component that fetches games from backend.getAllGames(), displays them in a responsive grid (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile) with GameCard sub-components, and manages game player modal/overlay state. Use the generated placeholder thumbnail at frontend/public/assets/generated/game-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png as fallback for any missing game thumbnails
Create GameCard component displaying game title, thumbnail image, and Play button with dark theme card styling and neon accent hover effects. Handle click to trigger parent callback for loading game
Create GamePlayer component as a modal/overlay with iframe for embedding game content, close button, and full-screen dark backdrop. Accept embedUrl prop and load game in iframe
Import and render GamesSection component with an id='games' attribute for navigation anchor targeting

requirements.summary: Build Shows section with video content grid
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 show cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has a title, cover image, and Watch button
Clicking Watch opens the video in an embedded iframe or modal
Show cards are visually distinct from game cards

file_operations.description: Create ShowsSection component that fetches shows from backend.getAllShows(), displays them in a responsive grid (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile) with ShowCard sub-components, and manages video player modal state. Use the generated placeholder thumbnail at frontend/public/assets/generated/show-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png as fallback for any missing show thumbnails

Create ShowCard component displaying show title, cover image, and Watch button with dark theme card styling distinct from GameCard (e.g., different accent color or border style) and neon accent hover effects. Handle click to trigger parent callback for loading video

Create VideoPlayer component as a modal/overlay with iframe for embedding video content (YouTube or other embeds), close button, and full-screen dark backdrop. Accept embedUrl prop and load video in iframe with appropriate allow attributes for autoplay
Import and render ShowsSection component with an id='shows' attribute for navigation anchor targeting

requirements.summary: Create hero/landing section with headline and quick-access buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is the first visible element on page load
Headline and tagline are displayed prominently
Three CTA buttons link to Proxy, Games, and Shows sections respectively

file_operations.description: Create HeroSection component with headline 'NexHub', tagline 'Browse freely. Play games. Watch shows.', and three CTA buttons linking to #proxy, #games, and #shows sections with smooth scroll. Use the generated hero banner image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png as background, and include the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/nexhub-logo.dim_128x128.png. Style with dark theme, neon text accents, and prominent typography
Import and render HeroSection component as the first element after Navigation, ensuring it appears at the top of the page on initial load
